items.prompt: The build phase is mainly for…
choices: Printing the final UVM report summary
Advancing simulation time with pin wiggles
Comparing scoreboard predict vs actual only
items.explain: Build creates components; it is not the time-consuming run phase.

items.prompt: Connect phase typically walks the tree…
choices: Bottom-up to wire ports and virtual interfaces
items.explain: After build, connect hooks TLM and vifs—usually bottom-up.

choices: Replace the need for a scoreboard
Are only used in report phase
items.explain: Raise/drop objections control when run may end.

items.prompt: The browser uvm-phases lab executes Accellera UVM inside your tab.
items.explain: Track B is a concept timeline; real phases run offline with a simulator.
